id.description: Id of the quote, use this value when signing a quote

must_accept_by.description: Human-readable UTC timestamp by which you must accept the quote and should be expected to be a short duration. If this time has passed already, request a new quote - the server will not sign a quote after must_accept_by has passed

good_until.description: number of seconds that quotes live

chain_id.description: Represents the ID of the chain

input_asset_address.description: Contract address of the asset you want to provide for the swap

input_amount.description: Amount of assets to be exchanged

output_asset_address.description: Contract address of the asset you want to receive in the swap

output_amount.description: Amount of assets you will receive in the exchange

input_value_in_usd.description: Amount in dollars to be exchanged

output_value_in_usd.description: Amount in dollars you will receive in the exchange

created_at.description: Unix Timestamp indicating the date and time when the quote was created
